cadence: annual (SCO publishes the prior calendar year each fall)
caveats: Government Compensation in California, reported to the State Controller. Public-employee names and salaries are disclosable (IFPTE Local 21 v. Superior Court, 2007); this is position-level, aggregated here to employer totals.
Covers state departments, counties, and cities for 2024 (the file set also offers UC, CSU, community colleges, special districts, and courts — added as captured).
Benefits shown are the employer's retirement + health/dental/vision contribution; pension unfunded-liability payments are reported separately by the systems.
